oracle_sql: SELECT * FROM CUSTOMERS WHERE UPPER(email) LIKE '%@GMAIL.COM%'
mysql_sql: SELECT customerid, email FROM CUSTOMERS WHERE email LIKE 'A%' LIMIT 100

oracle_sql: SELECT orderid, NVL(netamount, 0) FROM ORDERS WHERE ROWNUM <= 100
mysql_sql: SELECT orderid, IFNULL(netamount, 0) FROM ORDERS LIMIT 100

oracle_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS WHERE TRUNC(orderdate) = TRUNC(SYSDATE - 30)
mysql_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS WHERE orderdate >= DATE(NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND orderdate < DATE(NOW() - INTERVAL 29 DAY)

oracle_sql: SELECT c.firstname, o.totalamount FROM CUSTOMERS c, ORDERS o WHERE c.country = o.orderdate AND ROWNUM <= 100
mysql_sql: SELECT c.firstname, o.totalamount FROM CUSTOMERS c JOIN ORDERS o ON c.customerid = o.customerid LIMIT 100

SELECT DISTINCT c.* FROM CUSTOMERS c
        JOIN ORDERS o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
        JOIN ORDERLINES ol ON o.orderid = ol.orderid
        JOIN PRODUCTS p ON ol.prod_id = p.prod_id
        WHERE p.category = 4
        LIMIT 100

oracle_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS WHERE TO_CHAR(orderdate, 'YYYYMMDD') >= '20130101'
mysql_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS WHERE orderdate >= '2026-06-01'

oracle_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS WHERE TO_CHAR(orderdate, 'YYYY-MM') = '2013-01'
mysql_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS WHERE orderdate >= '2026-05-31' AND orderdate < '2026-06-01'

oracle_sql: SELECT TRUNC(orderdate, 'MM') FROM ORDERS WHERE ROWNUM <= 1000
